Jaya Arun Kumar Tulluri

Senior Systems Engineer · Python · AI/LLM · 5G/6G Automation

📧 jayaarunkumartulluri2@gmail.com · 📞 80086 23789 · LinkedIn →

Professional Summary

Senior Systems Engineer with 5+ years of experience engineering high-performance automation for complex 5G/6G testbeds. Specializing in the architectural transition from manual testing to autonomous, self-optimizing environments using Python, LLM, Agentic AI, and Cloud-Native (K8s/Docker) stacks.

Proven track record in building internal infrastructure and AI-assisted remediation engines that achieve 70% auto-resolution of failures and reduce MTTR by 55%. Expert in bridging the gap between low-level signaling protocol analysis and high-level AI delivery via FastAPI, Redis, and LLM orchestration.

Core Competencies

AI & LLM Ops

Agentic AI · LangChain · LLM Evaluation (Hallucination/Bias detection) · Ollama · QWEN 2.5 · Google Gemini · Claude Code · RAG workflows

Backend & Automation

Python · FastAPI · Robot Framework · Node.js · Celery · Multiprocessing · AsyncIO · GraphQL · REST · XML-RPC

Data & Infrastructure

Kubernetes · Docker · AWS (AppSync, AppFlow, IAM) · Redis · PostgreSQL · MongoDB · SQLite · SQLAlchemy · Pydantic

Frontend & Tools

Streamlit · React + Vite · Astro · Tailwind CSS · Figma · Git · GitLab · JIRA

Work Experience

Infinite Computer Solutions — Nokia Ext

Python Dev, Automation Tester · June 2025 – Present

Agentic AI Module for Autonomous Test Orchestration in 6G Testbeds

Building a modular agentic AI system that autonomously orchestrates end-to-end test scenarios across distributed infrastructure, self-optimizing based on real-time telemetry signals from multi-vendor service environments.

LOT3 CCTF TDG Germany — UDM/AUSF Testing 5G

Continued the project and its activities after shifting to Infinite.

Lightweight Packet Analysis Library — Filter Library for 5G

  • Built a Python packet-analysis library for automated failure detection and intelligent remediation, applying targeted display filters and real-time monitoring to reduce manual log analysis time from hours to seconds across distributed microservice environments.
  • Engineered an AI-assisted remediation engine with Redis caching that serves context-aware fix suggestions, achieving 70% auto-resolution of routine failures without human escalation, reducing MTTR by 55%, and earning adoption by operations teams with citations in three internal audits.
  • Led cross-team root-cause analysis revealing that 60% of system downtime originated from undetected silent failures in distributed services; delivered the full detection-to-remediation pipeline in 2 weeks, saving hundreds of engineering hours annually.

Python Packet Analysis Library Redis

Nokia Networks

Python Dev, Automation Tester · Aug 2022 – June 2025

LOT3 CCTF TDG Germany — UDM/AUSF Testing 5G

  • Executed end-to-end functional testing across distributed microservice APIs, analyzing R&D specifications to validate complex multi-step transaction flows and subscriber lifecycle scenarios in live production-equivalent environments.
  • Collaborated with client and deployment teams to execute assigned activities within Agile sprints, ensuring on-time completion of weekly project deliveries.
  • Managed Kubernetes (K8s) pod health and availability by performing regular health checks and log analysis to debug microservice behavior, ensuring stable deployment of UDM/AUSF functions.
  • Designed a real-time Kubernetes health dashboard for monitoring pod availability, service health, and resource utilization — giving clients live visibility into cluster state and reducing escalation response time.
  • Managed high-pressure delivery timelines by providing dedicated technical support during non-office hours, troubleshooting blockers to maintain project velocity.

TCOE — NFTRACE: REST Based Network Function Tracing Tool

  • Architected and implemented a distributed REST-based tracing platform for enterprise test automation, supporting real-time and scheduled batch execution modes, cutting pipeline validation time by 50% across Continuous Delivery workflows.
  • Built the full server-side stack in Python: FastAPI REST endpoints for lifecycle management (start/stop/merge/validate), Redis-backed session caching for parallel execution isolation, and SQLite persistence for node state and execution history.
  • Built client-side SDK integration with session management for multi-worker parallel processing via xmlrpc, enabling concurrent execution across distributed workers with result aggregation and GUI-level reporting.
  • Handled architecture for trace collection from network nodes/third-party servers, post-processing with filters/dissection, and scenario-based validations for protocols like SIP and Diameter.

Python FastAPI Docker Redis SQLite xmlrpc Multiprocessing Celery Git Jira

Self-Service Robot Keyword Generator

  • Built an internal web tool (Streamlit + FastAPI) where testers input high-level test descriptions and get ready-to-use Robot Framework keywords for common 5G procedures, reducing keyword creation time from hours to minutes.
  • Usage exploded organically to 50+ weekly generations, freeing seniors for complex scenarios like multi-vendor interoperability tests, and earning shoutouts in two sprint retrospectives.

Python Streamlit FastAPI Robot Framework

Abjayon Pvt Ltd

Node.js Backend & AWS Developer · Jan 2022 – July 2022

  • Utilized AWS services (AppSync, AppFlow) to integrate frontend and backend functionalities, improving data retrieval efficiency by 15%.
  • Developed and optimized GraphQL API queries and REST APIs using Axios and FastAPI, tested with Swagger and Postman.
  • Managed IAM roles for secure resource access, enhancing compliance.

Lakshya Space

Python & Web Developer · Mar 2021 – Jan 2022

  • Mentored and supervised a team of 19 interns in web development.
  • Developed Python firmware for embedded sensor systems in resource-constrained hardware environments.
  • Independently developed the portfolio website and supported other web development projects.

Personal Projects

Employee Management System

AI resume parser that cuts candidate onboarding from 15 minutes to 30 seconds. Upload a CV, chat in plain English to manage records — no manual data entry required.

View on GitHub →

Financial Statement Parser

100% private, browser-based AI that transforms messy bank statement PDFs into categorized Excel reports in 10 seconds. No servers, no data leaves your device.

View on GitHub →

LLM Eval Framework

Automated quality firewall for LLM outputs that catches hallucinations and prompt regressions in 4 minutes instead of 3 days — like a compiler for AI reliability.

View on GitHub →

LLM Bias Fairness Auditor

Regulatory-grade AI bias auditor for hiring & lending that detects discrimination in 60–120 seconds using statistical rigor, preventing compliance disasters before deployment.

View on GitHub →

Prompt Regression Suite

CI/CD test suite for prompts — catch breaking changes before production, run like pytest but for LLM outputs, cutting API costs 50% with fail-fast execution.

View on GitHub →

Blog Engine

Drop Markdown files in a folder, get a fully navigable documentation site instantly. No routing config, no frontend code — just write.
